name: com-tam
input: cơm tấm with grilled pork chop, đồ chua on the side and a fried egg on top
notes: Broken-rice plate with grilled pork chop (sườn) + fried egg. USDA pork chop (bone-in grilled) + fried egg + 1.25 cup cooked broken rice. Saigon street portions run larger than northern equivalents.
